## Duplication findings

### 1. Inject helper — 3 independent implementations

All three files implement the inject call from scratch, with meaningfully different approaches:

| File | Method | Secret loading |
|---|---|---|
| `email_act.py` | `urllib.request` (sync) | Parses `.env` file manually via `_load_inject_secret()` |
| `reminder_act.py` | `aiohttp` (async) | `os.environ.get("DISCORD_INJECT_SECRET")` |
